scripts.coverage:vault: HARDHAT_SOURCES=./test/solidity TS_NODE_CACHE=false DISABLE_V8_COMPILE_CACHE=1 hardhat coverage --testfiles 'test/unit/Vault.test.ts' && node scripts/check-vault-coverage.mjs
scripts.deploy:hardhat:
printf 'y
' | hardhat ignition deploy ignition/modules/CrapsGame.ts --network hardhat --deployment-id hardhat-local --write-localhost-deployment && CRAPS_DEPLOYMENT_ID=hardhat-local CRAPS_EXPORT_OUT=deployments/hardhat-deployment.json hardhat run scripts/export-deployment.ts --network hardhat
scripts.deploy:sepolia:rehearsal: pnpm deploy:sepolia:rehearsal-token && pnpm mint:sepolia:rehearsal-funds && pnpm deploy:sepolia
scripts.deploy:sepolia:
pnpm prepare:deploy:sepolia && printf 'y
' | CRAPS_USE_MOCKS=false CRAPS_DEPLOYMENT_ID=sepolia hardhat ignition deploy ignition/modules/CrapsGame.ts --network baseSepolia --deployment-id sepolia --parameters deployments/generated/sepolia-params.generated.json && CRAPS_USE_MOCKS=false CRAPS_DEPLOYMENT_ID=sepolia CRAPS_EXPORT_PARAMS=deployments/generated/sepolia-params.generated.json CRAPS_EXPORT_OUT=deployments/sepolia-deployment.json hardhat run scripts/export-deployment.ts --network baseSepolia
scripts.deploy:mainnet:
pnpm prepare:deploy:mainnet && printf 'y
' | CRAPS_USE_MOCKS=false CRAPS_DEPLOYMENT_ID=mainnet hardhat ignition deploy ignition/modules/CrapsGame.ts --network base --deployment-id mainnet --parameters deployments/generated/mainnet-params.generated.json && CRAPS_USE_MOCKS=false CRAPS_DEPLOYMENT_ID=mainnet CRAPS_EXPORT_PARAMS=deployments/generated/mainnet-params.generated.json CRAPS_EXPORT_OUT=deployments/mainnet-deployment.json hardhat run scripts/export-deployment.ts --network base
scripts.full:sepolia:rehearsal: pnpm preflight:sepolia:rehearsal && pnpm deploy:sepolia:rehearsal-token && pnpm verify:sepolia:rehearsal-token:sourcify && pnpm mint:sepolia:rehearsal-funds && pnpm deploy:sepolia && pnpm add:sepolia:consumer && pnpm verify:sepolia:sourcify
